First 4 columns are in initial data generation; Est_Traffic and Monthly_Value are calculated by agent using CTR=0.14 and CPC; verifier.py expects these columns (lines 85-102)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated dynamically with seed 42, creating 500 keyword entries with Search_Volume, Keyword_Difficulty, and CPC_USD metrics. The dataset includes an injected golden opportunity ('organic fair trade coffee beans bulk') with Volume=5000, KD=25, CPC=$5.00. Agents must calculate Est_Traffic (Volume × 0.14) and Monthly_Value (Traffic × CPC), filter for KD<40 and Volume≥200, and identify the top 20 keywords by Monthly_Value. The data contains 54 keywords meeting filter criteria, with the injected keyword ranking first with $3,500 monthly value.
